response.justification: Candidate significantly exceeds the entry/mid-level bar with 15+ years of experience, including Staff and Senior roles. Strong TypeScript/Node.js background, React exposure, AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes experience align well with the stack. Main risks are overqualification for a junior/mid role (likely compensation mismatch and retention concern) and PostgreSQL not being explicitly listed (MongoDB is the primary DB experience). Berlin-based, satisfying on-site requirement.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js fullstack experience with React and AWS CDK
Berlin-based, meeting high on-site presence requirement
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture, testability
concerns: Severely overqualified for junior/mid role — likely compensation and retention mismatch
Primary DB experience is MongoDB; no explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js mentioned
Only basic German, which may matter in a German consulting/construction context
